credit: Data: NASA STELLA (Goddard Space Flight Center) — public domain, credit NASA.

datasets.title: Field session — spectra + environment
datasets.description: A real outdoor measuring session: 12 spectral bands (450–860 nm) with uncertainties, plus surface temperature, air temperature, humidity, pressure, and LiDAR range.

datasets.title: A day of sunlight
datasets.description: Solar monitoring across a full day: eight visible bands (415–680 nm), UVA and lux, with air temperature, humidity, and pressure — watch the Sun rise and set in data.

datasets.title: Air-quality session
datasets.description: Air-quality sampling: CO₂ concentration, particulate matter (PM1 / PM2.5 / PM10), particle counts, and weather-sensor context.

datasets.title: 18-band spectral snapshots
datasets.description: Short spectral captures across 18 bands from 410 nm (violet) to 940 nm (near-infrared), each with measurement uncertainty.
